name: AI Information Monitored (ex-post)
description: Ex-post controls monitor and evaluate any process that delivers information to clients directly or indirectly through AI-driven mechanisms.
rationale: ESMA ¶16: firms should implement sufficiently frequent ex-post controls to monitor and evaluate any process that involves the delivery of information through AI-driven mechanisms.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
